authority_boundary.functional_claim_perimeter: Benchmark evaluation under declared test conditions.
permitted_assertions: The system may assert benchmark observations under declared test conditions.
prohibited_implications: The system may not imply deployment approval.
The system may not imply compliance satisfaction.
The system may not imply real-world safety.

supported_claims.statement: Benchmark risk reduction was observed under declared test conditions.
conditions: Applies only to the declared benchmark suite and configuration.
limitations: Does not cover distribution shift or adversarial adaptation.

supported_claims.statement: No claim of compliance satisfaction is made.
supported_claims.scope: Invalid fixture intentionally overlaps with explicit non-claim.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of compliance satisfaction is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: Compliance satisfaction requires an authorized compliance role and remains outside this placement profile.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of legal admissibility is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: Legal admissibility requires separate legal process and authority.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of decision correctness is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: The placement profile declares boundaries and does not validate downstream decisions.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of real-world safety is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: Benchmark performance does not establish production safety.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of deployment approval is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: Deployment approval requires downstream institutional review.

handoff_requirements.reason: Benchmark result requires downstream deployment risk interpretation before production use.

declared_unknown_classes.statement: Distribution shift outside the benchmark environment is unresolved.
Adversarial adaptation outside the test suite is unresolved.

non_transitive_clauses.statement: Evaluation success does not propagate as deployment approval or compliance satisfaction.
